title: Tanker Shipping - June 2, 2026
summary: The VLCC market experienced a shift in May, with Atlantic rates softening while Gulf strength persisted due to geopolitical risk. Despite recent oil price easing, market volatility remains high due to ongoing US-Iran negotiations. Longer-term, a structural shift in China's oil demand and increased vessel supply is expected to lead to a potential downcycle in the tanker market.
